# kSecValueRef

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a reference to the item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecValueRef: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value, depending on the item class requested, is of type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainItem], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKey], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCertificate], or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecIdentity].
title: kSecValueRef
